keyPointsSummary: 'Wanted' is the past tense of 'want' — same form for all subjects (I, he, she, we, they)
Used for desires or wishes in the past

quickQuiz.hindi: वह एक नई कार चाहता था।

quickQuiz.answer: She wanted to become a doctor.

quickQuiz.hindi: वे उस काम को खत्म करना चाहते थे।
quickQuiz.answer: They wanted to finish that work.

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे वह किताब नहीं चाहिए थी।
quickQuiz.answer: I did not want that book.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह मुझसे बात करना चाहता था।
quickQuiz.answer: He wanted to talk to me.

mustRememberRules: 'Wanted' is the past tense of 'want' — same form for all subjects (I, he, she, we, they)
Used for desires or wishes in the past
